name: Morgan Stanley Depositary Shares each representing 1/1000th of a share of 6.500% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series P
summary: Morgan Stanley Depositary Shares each representing 1/1000th of a share of 6.500% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series P represent fractional ownership in Morgan Stanley's preferred stock. The Series P preferred stock pays a fixed dividend of 6.500%. The dividends are non-cumulative, meaning any unpaid dividends do not accrue.
